title: Fair Work says stopping AI dismissal claims is an exercise in futility
description: Fair Work’s general manager has conceded that it would be “an exercise in futility” to try to stop artificial intelligence affecting the operations of the workplace umpire.
content:
The unprecedented artificial intelligence-driven surge in dismissal claims has blown out the time to resolve cases from less than four weeks to almost seven as the umpire concedes it cannot stop AI affecting its operations.

title: Reality Check: What triggered Accenture's historic stock plunge
description: Accenture witnessed one of the sharpest declines in its history after reporting its third-quarter FY26 results. title: AI is coming for your job, but what If it also paid you $60,000 a year?
description: Imagine losing your job to artificial intelligence, and still taking home upwards of $60,000 a year. That is the core promise of Universal High Income, a concept gaining serious traction among AI thinkers, policymakers, and even Elon Musk. It sounds far-fetched. But the debate has moved well beyond theory. What happens when AI takes your job, but still pays your bills?
